replace_block.to: DHFID = HFID Drift assessment, percent of calibration span
DHFID = HFID Drift assessment, percent of calibration span
DHFID = HFID Drift assessment, percent of calibration span

replace.search: (?<!used\. )The drift determination is outlined in method 25A section 8\.6\.2\. The drift for each run, the low-level and upscale drift must be less than or equal to 3\.0 percent of the calibration span\.
replace.replace: Calibration error is determined and must be less than or equal to 5.0 percent of calibration gas used. The drift determination is outlined in method 25A section 8.6.2. The drift for each run, the low-level and upscale drift must be less than or equal to 3.0 percent of the calibration span.
